name: Install DirectX Redistributable
code:
# ============================================================
#  🎮 DirectX End-User Runtimes - Silent Installer
# ============================================================

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  🎮 DirectX End-User Runtimes Setup        " -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  📅 June 2010 Redistributable              " -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host ""

# Check if already installed by looking for key DirectX DLLs
$dxCheckFiles = @(
    "$env:SystemRoot\System32\d3dx9_43.dll",
    "$env:SystemRoot\System32\d3dx10_43.dll",
    "$env:SystemRoot\System32\d3dx11_43.dll",
    "$env:SystemRoot\System32\XAudio2_7.dll"
)

$missingFiles = $dxCheckFiles | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }

if ($missingFiles.Count -eq 0) {
    Write-Host "✅ DirectX End-User Runtimes are already installed!" -ForegroundColor Green
    Write-Host "   All key DLLs found:" -ForegroundColor Gray
    foreach ($dll in $dxCheckFiles) {
        Write-Host "   ✔  $(Split-Path $dll -Leaf)" -ForegroundColor Gray
    }
    Write-Host ""
    Write-Host "⏭️  Skipping installation." -ForegroundColor Yellow
    Write-Host ""
    return
}

Write-Host "⚠️  Missing DirectX components detected:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
foreach ($file in $missingFiles) {
    Write-Host "   ❌ $(Split-Path $file -Leaf)" -ForegroundColor Red
}
Write-Host ""

# Define download URL
$url = "https://download.microsoft.com/download/8/4/A/84A35BF1-DAFE-4AE8-82AF-AD2AE20B6B14/directx_Jun2010_redist.exe"

# Set local paths
$destInstaller = "$env:TEMP\directx_Jun2010_redist.exe"
$extractPath   = "$env:TEMP\DirectX_Extract"

# Download the installer
Write-Host "⬇️  Downloading DirectX redist package..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $destInstaller
Write-Host "   ✅ Download complete" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host ""

# Extract the package
Write-Host "📂 Extracting files..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
Start-Process -FilePath $destInstaller -ArgumentList "/Q", "/T:$extractPath" -Wait
Write-Host "   ✅ Extraction complete" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host ""

# Silent installation
Write-Host "⚙️  Installing DirectX runtimes..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
Start-Process -FilePath "$extractPath\DXSETUP.exe" -ArgumentList "/silent" -Wait
Write-Host "   ✅ Installation complete" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host ""

# Cleanup
Write-Host "🧹 Cleaning up temp files..." -ForegroundColor Gray
Remove-Item $destInstaller -Force
Remove-Item $extractPath -Recurse -Force

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "  🎉 DirectX installed successfully!        " -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ""
